label: Keep File
description: Mark a stored execution file to survive the end-of-run sweep, then pass the reference through unchanged. Put this at the end of a pipeline so only the file(s) you actually want survive; everything left un-kept is swept when the run ends. No effect on project/shared files (those are persistent already).

inputs.name: file
inputs.description: Stored execution file to keep (any type).

outputs.name: file
outputs.description: The same reference, now flagged to survive the run.

fields.label: Keep for (days, 0 = forever)
fields.description: How long the kept file lives. Any access (download, read, presign) resets the clock. 0 means never expire.
